activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Forest Papper AB
Åsgatan 4
41463, GÖTEBORG
SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value:
Forest Papper AB
Åsgatan 4
414 63 GÖTEBORG
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' from certificate matches the invoicer on invoice with exact company name and matching address and country Sweden after normalizations. Land agreement confirmed per rule 4.1.4. Company name found in invoice header and address blocks (rule 4.1.0).

consignee.certificate_value:
VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.
PANCAR ORGANIZE SANAYI BOLGESI 
MUZAFFER SEKBAN CAD NO:8 
TORBALI IZMIR
TURKEY
consignee.invoice_value:
VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.
Pancar Organize Sanayi Bölgesi
Muzaffer Sekban cad. No:8 Torbali
IZMIR
TURKEY
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.' matches in both documents in invoice 'Buyer' and 'Delivery address' fields. The certificate consignee is found in the invoice's primary consignee fields with consistent address and country 'Turkey'. No contradictions found. Country matches per 4.2.3.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate goods description is a general term '48 Packages Fluting- Testliner' with invoice reference No 108759 and date 2023-03-08 allowing general goods description verification (rule 4.3.5). Invoice description is 'Testliner' only. Article numbers are not specified on certificate. Since general description with invoice reference is used, detailed text matching is bypassed. Confidence lowered due to difference in detail level.

quantity.invoice_value:
Total Quantity 23,425
Line quantities: 5,004 MT, 7,602 MT, 2,877 MT, 7,942 MT
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity 46740 kgs (46.740 MT) does not match invoice total quantity 23,425 (MT) or summed line quantities (approx 23.425 MT). Invoice quantities are approx half the certificate value. No allowed exception applies. Quantity thus classified as MISMATCH per 4.4.3.1 and 4.4.5.2.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'United Kingdom' is explicitly stated in invoice as 'Goods origin United Kingdom'. Country names match after normalization.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor, consignee and origin match between certificate and invoice. Goods description passes under general invoice reference but lacks detailed text match, requiring manual review. Quantity mismatch: certificate quantity of 46740 kgs does not correspond to invoice totals around 23425 MT. This quantity mismatch causes overall not identical and manual handling required.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Avsändare, mottagare och ursprungsland stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Varubeskrivningen är generell med hänvisning till faktura, vilket kräver manuell granskning. Kvantiteten i certifikatet (46740 kgs) skiljer sig markant från fakturans angivna kvantitet (23425 MT), vilket medför att verifieringen inte godkänns automatiskt.
